active_work.text: Non-Ayumi finish path update: fixed-effect binomial GLM parity, a 500-replicate Wald interval artifact, the first log(sigma) clamp sensitivity pilot, the skew-normal diagnostic pilot, and the q8 staged diagnostic artifact are banked; broader guard classes, q8 coverage/power, same-response hardening, Julia bridge promotion, and release readiness remain partial or planned.
